title: Frostbitten Horror
description: Struggle to survive in an eternal winter, hunted at every turn by monsters and haunted by twisted apparitions.
body:
![a dark cave, the screen is foggy and covered in frost. in the distance Alex stares at the screen with black eyes.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fc10a30525ab2cd268739b6f3b96d5b385cb4be_0.webp)

The world has been plunged into an eternal winter, breaks in the storm are few and far between. 
monsters thrive in the new darkness, but have become ravenous with hunger and twisted by the cold.

Players must manage their temperature and sanity to survive, all while gathering the resorces needed to keep the lights on and defend against hordes of dangerous mobs. 

play alone or with friends using the Essential mod, and lean into your playstyle niche with Origins, Classes, Backgrounds and Player Scale.
